description_long: This is a square, plush pillow with a smooth, slightly shiny surface and a deep burgundy color. The pillow appears well-stuffed, with gentle creases and subtle undulations along its edges, suggesting a soft and yielding texture. Its surface is free of any visible patterns, embroidery, or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The seams are not prominently visible, indicating a seamless or well-constructed design. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side. The pillow is shown isolated against a plain background, with no contextual placement.
description: A square, burgundy pillow with a smooth, solid surface and a plush, soft appearance.
description_view_0: Front view of a burgundy pillow, showing a smooth, slightly creased surface with no visible seams or decorations.
description_view_1: Side view of the same pillow, highlighting its fullness and the gentle undulations along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with a smooth, unadorned surface and subtle creasing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's plushness and lack of visible seams or features.
